meta.label: Value capture form
meta.description: Custom project creation macro to enforce value capturing
meta.author: valentina.pena@dataiku.com

params.name: admin_client_profile
params.label: Admin Client Profile
params.description: Admin client profile name used by the runnable

params.name: admin_api_token
params.label: Admin API Token
params.description: Admin API key value used to create an admin DSSClient

params.name: hub_project_name
params.label: Hub Project Name
params.description: Display name of the hub project (key is derived from this)

params.name: hub_project_owner
params.label: Hub Project Owner
params.description: DSS login that owns the hub project

params.name: hub_project_description
params.label: Hub Project Description
params.description: Description used when creating the hub project
params.defaultValue: Central hub for project intake logging

params.name: bronze_dataset_name
params.label: Bronze Dataset Name
params.description: Dataset name in the hub project for intake audit logging

params.name: fc_proj_types
params.label: Project Types
params.description: Radio options for Project Type (POC is auto-added by the plugin and is not logged)

params.name: fc_gbus_enabled
params.label: Enable GBUs
params.description: If disabled, hides the GBU field in the macro form

params.name: fc_business_users_enabled
params.label: Enable Business Users
params.description: If disabled, hides the Business Owner field in the macro form

params.name: fc_technical_users_enabled
params.label: Enable Technical Users
params.description: If disabled, hides the Technical Owner field in the macro form

params.name: fc_value_drivers_enabled
params.label: Enable Value Drivers
params.description: If disabled, hides the Value Drivers section in the macro form

params.name: fc_non_fin_impact_levels_enabled
params.label: Enable Non-Financial Impact Levels
params.description: If disabled, replaces non-fin impact dropdown with a free-text input

params.name: fc_non_fin_impact_levels
params.label: Non-Financial Impact Levels
params.description: Dropdown options for non-financial impact sizing

params.name: financial_value_drivers_enabled
params.label: Enable Financial Value Drivers
params.description: If disabled, treats all value drivers as non-financial

params.name: financial_value_drivers
params.label: Financial Value Drivers
params.description: Subset of Value Drivers that should use numeric USD input
